home.heroSubtitle: Every stitch shaped by hand, for those who see dressing as a quiet statement.
home.featuredSubtitle: The designs defining this season, selected from our three core collections.
home.storyTitle: Tailoring is a ritual, not a transaction
home.storyBody: At Đức Chinh atelier, every design begins as a hand-drawn sketch and ends after hundreds of hours of careful labor. We believe true luxury lives in the details no one sees — the inner seam, the grain of the fabric, the balance of a silhouette.
home.editorialBody: We design for the moments that matter — where the silence of a garment speaks louder than any pattern.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Sign up for early access to new collections and members-only events.
home.newsletterDisclaimer: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

collectionsPage.subtitle: Explore our full body of work, organized by line.

about.title: Our Story
about.intro: Đức Chinh Fashion began in a small atelier in Hanoi, built on the belief that the finest garments are made by hand, and by patience.
about.philosophyBody: We don't chase short-lived trends. Every collection is built around enduring lines, premium materials, and a restrained palette — so what you wear today still means something years from now.
about.craftBody: Each piece takes an average of 40 hours to complete, by artisans with over a decade of experience, from fabric selection to the final finishing touch.
about.value1Body: We produce in small batches to ensure every detail meets our standard.
about.value2Body: We favor natural materials and transparent production partners.
about.value3Body: Every client receives individual guidance, never a generic experience.
about.ctaBody: Feel the fabric and stitching for yourself at our Hanoi showroom.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Our advisors are ready to help, from sizing to bespoke commissions.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.addressValue: 15 Hang Trong Street, Hoan Kiem, Hanoi

footer.description: Premium tailored fashion, handcrafted in Hanoi since 1998.
